title.en: Miao An shook her head and said.

content.en:
"True Yang, even if there is the help of the True River Valley, it is just a little more certain!"

Miao An shook her head and said.

"No matter what, you must give it a try, if you are really chosen, you will be vigorously cultivated by the Taisu Palace, and you are even expected to surpass your mother Xuan Miao Palace Master in the future!"

The Xuanmiao Palace Master of Taisu Palace is the existence of the Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm, although it is not considered powerful among the many sub-palace palace masters in the entire Taisu Palace, but the Fivefold Supreme Dao Realm already belongs to the very powerful Supreme Dao Realm.

The Xuanmiao Palace Master has dozens of heirs, and Miao An does not get many resources from the Xuanmiao Palace Master, and only by getting the resources of the entire Taisu Palace can he really grow up.

"True Yang, there are still a few forces, I also have to win them over, if they are willing to send some Supreme Dao Realm to help me, I can hope to surpass the other Supreme Dao Realm seeds in Taisu Palace and win the double Supreme Dao Realm quota!" Miao An said.

"Good!"

True Yang nodded.

......

Soon, time passed slowly.

The geniuses of the Taisu Palace to the Dao Realm are all trying to win over the Dao Realm, just to obtain the quota that the Taisu Palace has vigorously cultivated.

Every spot represents the future.

Gradually, the time for the competition for places is approaching.

this day.

Ye Tian and many elders of the True River Valley came to the vicinity of the Xuanlin Mountain Boundary of the Ninth Strange Land, where there was also an ancient giant city, Xuanlin Mountain City, which belonged to the Taisu Palace.

In the past, Xuanlin Mountain City did not have many Dao realms.

But at this time, Xuanlin Mountain City was full of Dao Realm powerhouses, almost all of whom had entered the Xuanlin Mountain Realm to assist the geniuses of Taisu Palace to Dao Realm.

"There are really many supreme realms here!"

After Ye Tian came here, he said secretly.

Soon, he met Miaoan of Taisu Palace and Zhenyang, the son of the Lord of the True River Valley.

These two were both dual-level Dao realms, but Ye Tian estimated that none of them were his true opponents.

Of course, his Cave Light Replica Body was naturally no match for them.

But once they enter the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, the strength of these two will inevitably be suppressed, and it will be difficult to exert too strong strength, so they may not be his opponents.

After all, he created the Supreme Dao Divine Power, and they didn't necessarily create the Supreme Dao Divine Power.

Miao An saw that all the Supreme Dao Realm powerhouses he had recruited were coming, so he said, "Everyone, thank you for coming to help me, the reward promised before will definitely be given afterwards." In addition, for the sake of your safety, this time I will give each of you a two-pattern Dao-level armor weapon!"

Wow!!!

One piece of armor emerged, and it was the standard armor made by Taisu Palace, this was a real two-pattern to Dao-level weapon, and it was also a defense-level weapon, and its value was not low.

Generally, there are at most one or two second-grain Dao-level weapons in the two-fold Dao realm, but most of the one-heavy Dao realm must not have two-pattern Dao-level weapons, let alone defensive armor weapons.

It's not that you can't afford it, it's that the second-pattern to Dao-level weapons are very difficult to refine, and the quantity is scarce, and most of the forces will not take them out for sale.

Therefore, many of the first-level Dao realms present did not have second-level Dao-level weapons.

At this time, a one-heavy Dao Realm said excitedly: "Lord Miao'an, are these two Dao-level armors completely given to us?"

Miao An shook her head, "Of course not, it's just for you to use for the time being, to ensure your safety." The value of the second-pattern to the Dao-level weapon is not low, if you really want it, you can do it, but the benefits obtained later will be reduced accordingly. "

Seeing this, these Yizhong Dao Realm may be a little disappointed, but when they think of the benefits they may obtain later, they gradually look forward to it.

Suddenly.

Miao An took out a scroll.

"This is the Supreme Dao Oath Scroll, everyone sign it!" said Miao An.

These Supreme Dao Realms know that they need to sign the Supreme Dao Oath, otherwise they will not be at ease with each other, and Miao An will not be at ease either.

Thereupon.

One by one, the Supreme Dao Realm signed the Supreme Dao Oath, so that they would be one during this period of time, and no one would dare to betray them.

After signing the contract, Miao An said: "Everyone, after entering the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, everything must be subject to my arrangement, after all, my understanding of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm must be far beyond yours." Without my permission, no one in the Dao Realm is allowed to leave without permission. "

"Yes!"

Many Supreme Dao Realms nodded one after another.

It's been another time.

It's time to enter the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

The Xuanlin Mountain Realm is the Ninth Strange Land, and there are many resources in it, and under normal circumstances, outsiders are not allowed to enter.

But this time, they were undoubtedly stained with Miao'an's light, so they could come in.

But in fact, these Supreme Dao Realms only knew that there were some dangers in the Ninth Strange Land, but they didn't know how many dangers there were.

The knowledge of this place only exists in the hearsay, and the heart is not too worried or afraid.

But it won't be long before they will have a new understanding of the Ninth Strange Land in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

......

In front of a glorious Void Gate.

A statue of Taisu Palace is stationed here.

These Taisuwei are all men, and the disciples of Taisu Palace are all women, and if men want to join Taisu Palace, they can only take the path of Taisuwei.

The Taisu Guards are all to the Dao Realm, the captains of the guards are all Triple Dao Realms, and the chief captains who lead a Tai Su Guards are the Triple Dao Realms.

And Tai Suwei has one emperor, ten monarchs, and thirty-six generals, of which thirty-six generals are all four-fold to the Dao realm, ten monarchs are all five-fold to the Dao realm, and Taisuwei's most powerful emperor is the six-fold to the Dao realm.

And Tai Su Wei is only subordinate to Tai Su Palace, which shows how terrifying the real Tai Su Palace is.

And the Wuji Heavenly Palace is much more powerful than the Taisu Palace, so it is even more terrifying.

In the past, Ye Tian did not have a probability of the strength of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, but now it can be regarded as the supreme path.

At the beginning, the cultivation of the Wuji Supreme Dao Fruit was also that the Wuji Heavenly Palace wanted to keep a low profile, so it only sent a heavy Dao Realm guard, just because he didn't want to attract attention, but he didn't expect it to be cheaper than Ye Tian.

Of course, until now, Ye Tian didn't know the effect of the Wuji Dao Fruit, and he didn't dare to inquire.

"Stop!"

Tai Suwei intercepted Ye Tian and them.

Even if Miao An came with a group of Supreme Dao Realms, they would still need to be checked.

Soon, the inspection passed, and many supreme realms followed Miao'an into the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

Airplanes!!!!

The void transforms, as if across infinite time and space.

Soon.

A Venerable Dao Realm descended to the Xuanlin Mountain Realm.

At this time, a little bit of the double Dao realm felt the suppression of the rules of the Xuanlin Mountain Realm, and their faces changed one by one.

However, Yizhong Dao Realm didn't feel anything, as if it was almost the same as the outside world.

"Familiarize yourself with the rules here as soon as possible, otherwise the battle will be affected!" Miao An reminded.

"Yes!"

Those who are in the double realm have responded to the Dao.
